programme.title: Salaam E Ishq: A Tribute to Love
programme.desc: According to a famous author, love is not always easy, but it is worth the struggle. Exemplifying this sentiment, six couples burn some bridges and bridge some distances to find their happiness.

programme.title: Veerappan
programme.desc: Veerappan, a teenager, trains under his uncle to learn to smuggle and becomes a dacoit. When the police attempts to arrest him for his activities, he plans to make an escape.

programme.title: Faraaz
programme.desc: Five terrorists take the staff and customers of Holey Artisan café in Dhaka hostage. Faraaz and his friends are among the hostages as the police try to de-escalate the situation.

programme.title: Kapoor & Sons
programme.desc: Two brothers reunite when their grandfather suddenly falls ill. However, their reunion re-ignites past drama when they both fall for the same girl.

programme.title: Panga

programme.title: City Lights
programme.desc: Deepak Singh, an ex-army person from Rajasthan, moves to Mumbai with his family hoping for a better lifestyle. However, upon arrival, he realises that everything is not as easy as it seems.

programme.title: Sanak
programme.desc: Vivaan, a skilled MMA trainer, takes his wife Anshika to the hospital for an urgent operation. However, he is forced to take action when a terrorist group takes Anshika and other patients hostage.

programme.title: Tanhaji: The Unsung Warrior
programme.desc: Tanhaji, a Maratha warrior, is Shivaji Maharaj's trusted lieutenant. When the Mughals invade and conquer Kondhana fort, he sets out to reclaim it for his king and country.
